title: NIO Stock Jumps. This Is How You Overcome an Industry Sales Slump.
content: Shares of Chinese electric-vehicle maker NIO were up early Thursday after the company reported better-than-expected quarterly numbers. New products are helping NIO overcome an industry sales slump. Guidance implies car sales of more than 40,000 per month in May and June.

title: Stock Futures Fall After Nvidia Earnings
content: Stocks were on track to fall Thursday as investors shrugged off strong results from artificial intelligence chip maker Nvidia and hoped for progress in the peace talks between the U.S. and Iran. The three major indexes snapped a three-session losing streak on Wednesday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. was in the final stage of negotiations with Iran to end the war in the Middle East. Futures were swinging early Thursday, suggesting that the market doesn’t quite know what to make of Nvidia’s first-quarter earnings.

title: Micron and SK Hynix Stocks Rise. The Memory-Chip Boom Is Back.

title: BNY (BK): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
content: Since May 2021, the S&P 500 has delivered a total return of 79.9%. But one standout stock has more than doubled the market - over the past five years, BNY has surged 169% to $136.58 per share. Its momentum hasn’t stopped as it’s also gained 27% in the last six months thanks to its solid quarterly results, beating the S&P by 15.5%.
